creator: m@kappa.st
text:
New release available. 

Current version 0.80.2 in the ports tree has a security hole (see http://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2011-2720).

       Announcement: http://www.glpi-project.org/spip.php?page=annonce&id_breve=259&lang=en

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
